'''âr-dh-b-ch''' ('''karadhbechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fledge|fledge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-dh-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fledge|fledge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-dh-b-ch
|-
! Lemma
| karadhbechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiradhbechoko|thiradhbechoko]] || [[word:jiradhbechoko|jiradhbechoko]] || [[word:shiradhbechoko|shiradhbechoko]] || [[word:kiradhbechoko|kiradhbechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
